input.content:
Status
DONE

Role
reviewer

Summary
Spec compliance review of query-coverage-polish-impl (and its dependency query-hardening-impl). All acceptance criteria satisfied. No spec violations.

Changed Files
- None (reviewer only)

Verification
- `npm run typecheck` — Passed
- `npm test -- --run tests/integration/query-engine.test.ts` — 8/8 passed
- Code audit: query-engine.ts lines 67-91 (findKnowledge 3-step ordering), 179-195 (getLatestKnowledge omits minConfidence), 203-217 (pickLatestByEntityAndFact no visibility filter)
- Code audit: types.ts lines 884-897 (NarrativeKnowledgeFilter JSDoc with includeHistory non-dedup documentation)

Findings
- Accepted: findKnowledge satisfies the required 3-step ordering. Step 1 (lines 69-76): store query with entityId/factId/source/atChapter only, no minConfidence. Step 2 (getLatestKnowledge -> pickLatestByEntityAndFact, lines 179-217): selects latest per (entityId, factId) by knownSince DESC + rowid DESC. Step 3 (lines 78-90): applies includeSealed then minConfidence visibility filters.
- Accepted: minConfidence cannot pre-filter sealed records. Both getLatestKnowledge branches (lines 181-184, 189-193) and the history path (lines 69-76) omit minConfidence from store queries. Line 82 guard (`knowledge.confidence > 0`) ensures sealed records bypass minConfidence entirely.
- Accepted: All required test scenarios present and semantically correct. (1) rowid arbitration seal-then-restore (line 175), (2) includeHistory+includeSealed (line 285), (3) entityId+factId+minConfidence combination (line 226), (4) minConfidence with newer seal (line 134). Each test constructs the bug scenario and asserts the correct outcome.
- Accepted: NarrativeKnowledgeFilter JSDoc (types.ts lines 888-889) documents: "includeHistory=true 时返回 Store 层匹配的全部历史记录，不做 (entityId, factId) 最新态去重；封印记录是否出现仍由 includeSealed 控制."
- Accepted: Query Layer remains read-only. No imports of LLM/Embedding/Thread/Retcon types. No new dependencies. No state writes.
- Accepted: query-coverage-polish-impl stayed within Allowed Scope (src/types.ts JSDoc only, test file, dev log). No modifications to query-engine.ts. Forbidden Actions respected.

Final Result
DONE

Risks Or Follow-ups
- Non-blocking: Unbounded results when neither entityId nor factId provided. Pre-existing behavior.
- Non-blocking: includeHistory returns all records without deduplication. Documented in JSDoc.
- Phase 2 items out of scope.
